# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

meshConfig:
  defaultConfig:
    proxyAdminPort: 15000
  defaultResources:
    limits:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 128Mi
    requests:
      cpu: 10m
      memory: 40Mi
  enableEnvoyAdmin: true
  envoyAccessLogService: {}
  envoyMetricsService: {}
  enableTracing: false
  configSources: 
    - address: xds-grpc
  accessLogFormat: ""
  accessLogEncoding: JSON
  
# To expose admin endpoints on all pods, make sure network policies or security groups allow accessing port 15000 from desired IPs or networks for debugging purposes.
